name: AWS RDS Aurora Serverless v2 PostgreSQL
description: Deploys a highly available, security-hardened Amazon Aurora Serverless v2 PostgreSQL database in private subnets, featuring automatic backup policies and AWS Secrets Manager credentials integration.
architectureSummary: Sets up an Aurora PostgreSQL database cluster using Serverless v2 capacity scaling (ACUs). Places instances within private subnets using a dedicated DB subnet group. Connects to a master credentials secret in Secrets Manager which automatically generates and rotates passwords. Configures target security groups and encrypted storage.
securityNotes: The database resides inside private subnets and has no public internet route. Access is locked down strictly via security groups, limiting ingress exclusively to explicitly defined CIDRs or allowed security groups (e.g. ECS Fargate tasks). Master credentials are never stored in plain text — they are generated dynamically and stored in AWS Secrets Manager with KMS encryption.

versions.changelog: Initial release with Aurora PostgreSQL cluster, Serverless v2 scaling, Secrets Manager master password, DB subnet group, security group, and storage encryption.

inputs.name: project_name
inputs.label: Project Name
inputs.description: A unique name for the project, used in resource naming and tagging.

inputs.name: environment
inputs.label: Environment
inputs.description: The deployment environment (e.g., dev, staging, production).

inputs.name: aws_region
inputs.label: AWS Region
inputs.description: The AWS region to deploy the database into.

inputs.name: vpc_id
inputs.label: VPC ID
inputs.description: The ID of the VPC where database resources will reside.

inputs.name: subnet_ids
inputs.label: Private Subnet IDs
inputs.description: Comma-separated list of private subnet IDs for the database subnet group (minimum 2 in different AZs).

inputs.name: database_name
inputs.label: Initial Database Name
inputs.description: The name of the default database to create in the cluster.

inputs.name: min_capacity
inputs.label: Min Capacity (ACUs)
inputs.description: The minimum Aurora Capacity Units (ACUs) to scale down to (e.g., 0.5, 1, 2).

inputs.name: max_capacity
inputs.label: Max Capacity (ACUs)
inputs.description: The maximum Aurora Capacity Units (ACUs) to scale up to.

inputs.name: backup_retention_period
inputs.label: Backup Retention Days
inputs.description: The number of days to retain automated database backups (1-35).

inputs.name: allowed_security_group_ids
inputs.label: Allowed Security Group IDs
inputs.description: Optional comma-separated list of security group IDs permitted to connect to the database.

inputs.name: tags
inputs.label: Additional Tags
inputs.description: Optional comma-separated key=value pairs for additional resource tags (e.g., team=database,cost-center=data).

outputs.name: cluster_endpoint
outputs.description: The read-write endpoint connection string of the cluster.

outputs.name: cluster_reader_endpoint
outputs.description: The read-only endpoint connection string of the cluster.

outputs.name: secret_arn
outputs.description: The ARN of the Secrets Manager secret containing database connection credentials.
